data.body:
## Description
Remove all .tickets/ and bare tk references from skill files and prompts. Turn Task 3 RED tests GREEN.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md — remove find .tickets/, edit .tickets/<id>.md patterns, .tickets/ skip-worktree context; update pathspec exclusions from .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/
- plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md — update .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/ in conflict guards and pathspec exclusions
- plugins/dso/skills/resolve-conflicts/SKILL.md — update .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/ in conflict guards
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md — remove .tickets/<id>.md editing references
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md — remove .tickets/<id>.md creation/editing references
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md — remove .tickets/*.md grep patterns
- plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/SKILL.md — update .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/epic-validation-review.md — update .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/impl-plan-dispatch.md — remove .tickets/<id>.md editing rules

## Key distinction
- Guards that say "do NOT edit .tickets/" or "NEVER use git checkout --ours -- .tickets/" → update path to .tickets-tracker/, keep the guard logic
- Direct-edit patterns like "edit .tickets/<id>.md directly" → remove entirely (replaced by ticket comment API)

## TDD Requirement
Task 3 RED tests must turn GREEN after these changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All Task 3 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] No raw .tickets/ references in skill files (excluding .tickets-tracker/)
  Verify: grep -r '\.tickets/' plugins/dso/skills/ | grep -v '.tickets-tracker/' | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 != 0)}'
